narrative:
Precinct Toledo 5H (precinct in Lucas County) has 882 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points.
